blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I meant what I said. About the friendship. It's not an excuse or a — I'm not trying to stall. I genuinely mean it.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Tell me again. In person.
She looked at her hands on the table.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You are the most important person in my life. You have been since I was eight years old. And the feelings — what I feel for you — they've been there a long time too. But they grew inside of the friendship. They're not separate from it. And I am scared that if we make it something defined and it doesn't work, I lose both. Not just one.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You think what we have could break.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I think anything can break if you put enough pressure on it without knowing what you're building.
He sat with that.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Daisy. Can I say something.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Yeah.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: What we already have — what it already is — that's not a friendship with feelings on the side. That IS the thing. We've been it for years. The reason you're scared to break it is because it's already real. Already something. The label doesn't change what it is.
She looked up.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I'm not saying let's figure it all out tonight. I'm saying — you don't have to be scared of naming something that already exists. We're not building something new. We're just calling it what it is.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: And what is it.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: It's you and me. It's always been you and me.
She exhaled slowly. He watched her — the way she processed things, taking each piece and turning it over before she answered. He'd been watching her do this for ten years. He could wait.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: What about the distance. Spring semester.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: We did the distance.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: We did the distance with no name.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: And we're still here.
She was quiet. Then she reached across the table and put her hand over his.
